title: Buying Fruit 买水果
scene: 奶奶带孙子去水果店买水果。

lines.en: Leo, let's buy some fruit. What do you want to eat?
lines.zh: 里奥，我们买些水果吧。你想吃什么？

lines.en: I want strawberries! They are my favorite!
lines.zh: 我要草莓！我最喜欢草莓了！

lines.en: We have fresh strawberries today. Very sweet!
lines.zh: 我们今天有新鲜的草莓。很甜！

lines.en: Thirty yuan a box. They just arrived this morning.
lines.zh: 三十元一盒。今天早上刚到的。

lines.en: Grandma, can we also get some oranges?
lines.zh: 奶奶，我们也能买些橙子吗？

lines.en: The oranges are ten yuan a kilo. Very juicy!
lines.zh: 橙子十元一公斤。非常多汁！

lines.en: Give us one box of strawberries and two kilos of oranges.
lines.zh: 给我们一盒草莓和两公斤橙子。

lines.en: That's fifty yuan altogether. Would you like a bag?
lines.zh: 一共五十元。需要袋子吗？

lines.en: Thank you! I can't wait to eat the strawberries!
lines.zh: 谢谢！我等不及要吃草莓了！
